incomeVsExpense7DaysDescription: Uko imari yagenze mu cyumweru gishize
addIncomeExpenseToSeeTrend: Andika ibyo wakoze ubone uko imari ihagaze.
noTopCustomersHint: Fungura 'SMS capture' muri 'Ibindi' kugira ngo abakwishyura kuri MoMo baze hano.
topCustomersDemoNote: Icyitegererezo. Fungura 'SMS capture' muri Settings kugira ngo abakwishyura baze hano.
tryClearFilters: Hindura itariki cyangwa usibe ibyo washatse
smsParseError: Ntibyashobotse gusoma iyi SMS. Reba niba ari iya MoMo cyangwa Airtel Money.
dataStorageDescription: Amakuru yawe abikwa neza mu gicu. Ushobora kuyimanurira kuri telefone cyangwa ukayagarura.
smsCaptureSubtitle: Andika MoMo na Airtel Money vuba
smsCaptureDescription: MobiFlow ihita yandika igikorwa buri nshuro uhawe cyangwa wishyuye kuri MoMo. Bisaba uburenganzira bwo gusoma SMS.
smsCaptureForegroundNote: Imenyekanisha izakomeza kugaragara niyo porogaramu yaba ifunze.
scanPastCompleteNone: Nta butumwa bushya bwa MoMo bwabonetse.
scanPastError: Gusoma ubutumwa bwa kera byanze. Reba niba telefone yakwemereye gusoma SMS.
smsCaptureHint: Ibi bikora kuri telefone za Android gusa.
smsCaptureAndroidOnly: Gusoma SMS bikora kuri Android gusa.
faqAddTransactionQ: Nandika nte amafaranga yinjiye cyangwa asohotse?
faqAddTransactionA: Kanda akamenyetso ka (+) kuri ecran ya 'Ahabanza' cyangwa 'Ibyakozwe'. Shyiramo umubare w'amafaranga, icyo yakoreshejwe, n'icyiciro arimo.
faqChangePasswordA: Guhindura ijambobanga mu buryo bworoshye biri vuba. Ubu koresha 'Wibagiwe ijambobanga' igihe winjira, cyangwa utwandikire tugufashe.
faqDataSecureA: Yego rwose. Amakuru yawe abikwa mu buryo bwizewe. Tuyakoresha gusa kugira ngo tuguhe raporo n'isesengura ry'ubucuruzi bwawe. Ntituyagurisha kandi ntituyasangiza abandi.
faqSmsCaptureA: Iyo ufunguye 'Soma SMS za MoMo', MobiFlow ihita imenya ubutumwa bwa MTN MoMo cyangwa Airtel Money. Ihita yandika ayo mafaranga utiriwe ubyandika n'intoki. Ushobora kubihagarika igihe cyose ubishakiye muri Setting.
faqAnomalyA: Ibi biza iyo ufunguye igikorwa kirimo amafaranga menshi cyane ugereranyije n'ayo usanzwe ukoresha. Tubikwerekera kugira ngo ubyitondere, si uko biba ari ikosa.
faqBackupQ: Nabika nte amakuru yanjye ngo ntazatakarira muri telefone?
faqBackupA: Jya kuri 'Ububiko' muri Setting. Ushobora kuyabika mu gicu (cloud) cyangwa ukayamanura. Ibi bigufasha kugarura amakuru niyo wahindura telefone.
resetConfirmMessage: Ugiye gusubira ku ntangiriro ya porogaramu.
tapToSetGoals: Kanda hano ushyireho intego yawe ya mbere
aboutDescription: MobiFlow ni porogaramu yoroshye ifasha abacuruzi gukurikirana imari yabo mu Rwanda. Ifasha gukura amakuru muri SMS za MTN MoMo na Airtel Money kugira ngo utandika buri kintu n'intoki. Intego yacu ni ugufasha ubucuruzi buciriritse kugira amakuru yizewe kugira ngo bafate imyanzuro myiza kandi bitegure kwaka inguzanyo cyangwa ishoramari.
contactSupportEmailSubtitle: Twandikire niba ukeneye ubufasha cyangwa ufite igitekerezo
comingSoonChangePhone: Guhindura nomero bisaba ko tukumenya neza. Twandikire kuri {{email}} tugufashe.
comingSoonChangePassword: Guhindura ijambobanga ntabwo bishoboka ubu. Twandikire kuri {{email}} tugufashe.
statementDownloaded: Raporo y'amateka yakuweho kuri telefoni yawe
reportSavedMessage: Raporo y'ubushobozi bwo guhabwa inguzanyo yabitswe. Ushobora kuyisanga mu folda wahisemo.
restoreFromCloudDescription: Hitamo ububiko wo kugarura. Ibi bizongeramo ibikorwa n'igenamiterere.
noCloudBackups: Nta bubiko mu gicu. Kubika mu gicu mbere.
dataSafetyTipBody: Kubika mu gicu kugira ngo utazatakaza ibikorwa byawe.
cloudBackupFailed: Kubika mu gicu byanze. Reba umuyoboro.
restoreFromCloudFailed: Kugarura byanze. Reba umuyoboro cyangwa hitamo undi bubiko.
deleteAccountConfirm: Ibi bizasiba konti yawe n'amakuru yose burundu. Ntibishobora kugarurwa.
deleteAllTransactionsConfirm: Ibi bizasiba ibikorwa byanjye byose kuri cloud. Urashobora kongera kubinjiza kuva kuri backup cyangwa reka SMS capture kubongeraho n'uburyo bushya bwo kureba duplicate. Komeza?
deleteAllTransactionsDone: {{count}} bikorwa bisibwe. Gusesengura SMS zabanje bizongera gukora igihe ufungura porogaramu kugira ngo ibikorwa bishobore kongera kwongerwa n'uburyo bushya.
deleteAllTransactionsSubtitle: Kuraho ibikorwa byose kuri cloud kugira ngo ushobore kubinjiza kuva kuri backup cyangwa reka SMS kubongera kubongeraho n'uburyo bushya.
onboardingHeadline: Cunga imari y'ubucuruzi bwawe mu buryo bworoshye.
onboardingBody: MobiFlow ihindura ubutumwa bwa MoMo ho amakuru asobanutse. Reba inyungu n'aho amafaranga asohokera.
agreeToTermsAndPrivacy: Nemeye amategeko n'amabwiriza na politiki y'ibanga
bySigningInYouAgree: Winjiye utemeye amategeko n'amabwiriza na politiki y'ibanga.
termsIntro: Ukoresheje MobiFlow uemera ibi bikurikira. Twebwe tubigenza bugufi kugira ngo usobanukirwe.
termsUseOfAppBody: MobiFlow igufasha gukurikirana imari. Ni inshingano zawe kurinda ijambobanga ryawe.
termsYourDataBody: Twubaha ibanga ryawe. Ntiducuruza amakuru yawe. Tuyakoresha gusa kugira ngo tuguhe raporo.
termsAcceptableUseBody: Ntuzakoreshe iyi porogaramu mu bintu binyuranyije n'amategeko ya Leta.
termsContact: Ukeneye ubufasha? Twandikire muri 'Ubufasha' cyangwa kuri imeyili.
defaultCategoriesHint: Ibikoresho, Transport, Amazi/Umuriro, Ubukode, Imishahara, Ibindi
scoreMessageConsider: Tekereza kugabanya ibyasohotse cyangwa kongera ayinjira.
scoreMessageNoData: Ongeraho byibuze ibikorwa 3 kugira ngo ubone inshuro y'ubuzima bw'ubucuruzi bwawe.
creditworthinessDisclaimer: Bishingiye kuri raporo yawe gusa. Iki si score y'indi nkwiye yo ku banki. Abaha indi nkwiye ni bo bagira icyo batora.
creditworthinessReasonInsufficientData: Ongeraho ibikorwa byibuze iminsi 7 n'amafaranga y'injira muri iki gihe kugira ngo uhabwe isuzuma.
creditworthinessReasonNegativeCashFlow: Amafaranga yasohoka arenga ayinjira muri iki gihe.
creditworthinessReasonNoSavings: Amafaranga y'injira bihagije ariko nta mafaranga yabitswe.
creditworthinessReasonLowSavings: Igipimo cy'amafaranga yabitswe cike kurenza 10%. Abaha indi nkwiye bakunze kubona buffer.
creditworthinessReasonPositiveFlow: Amafaranga y'injira bihagije cyangwa arenga ayasohoka muri iki gihe.
creditworthinessReasonSavingsRate: Igipimo cy'amafaranga yabitswe cyiza cyerekana ubushobozi bwo kwishyura.
unusualAmountHint: Umubare utari busanzwe (biringaniye n'amakuru ya vuba)
deleteCategoryConfirm: Siba "{{name}}"? Ibikorwa byari biyanditseho bizajya mu cyiciro cya "Ibindi".
businessHealthTipsIntro: Inzira zoroshye zifasha ubucuruzi bwawe kwiyubaka. Kanda buto ziri hasi kugira ngo uzibashe ubu.
tipTrackIncomeBody: Igihe amafaranga yinjira cyangwa asohoka, ongeraho hano. Porogaramu izabibuka byose.
tipTrackIncomeBenefit: Uzamenya buri gihe amafaranga ufite angana iki
tipBuildReserveBody: Gerageza kuzigama amafaranga ashobora kugutunga amezi 3. Bifasha igihe ubucuruzi buhagaze.
tipSeparateSpendingBody: Igihe ongeraho igikorwa, hitamo niba ari cy'urugo cyangwa cy'ubucuruzi. Koresha ibyiciro bitandukanye.
tipSeparateSpendingBenefit: Uzabona neza uko ubucuruzi bwawe buhagaze
tipLowBalanceAlertsBody: Gufungura imenyekanisha. Porogaramu izakumenyesha igihe amafaranga make, mbere y'uko ashira.
tipReviewReportsBody: Reba urupapuro rwa Raporo buri kwezi. Bona aho amafaranga yawe agiye kandi witegure ibikurikira.
tipReviewReportsBenefit: Uzakora ibyemezo byiza ku mafaranga yawe
tipImproveCashFlow: Shyura vuba, wishyure imyenda ku gihe
tipImproveCashFlowBody: Saba abakiriya kwishyura vuba. Wishyure imyenda igihe ziriho. Komeza amafaranga make mu bihe bigoye.
allowSmsCaptureDescription: MobiFlow ikeneye gusoma SMS za MoMo kugira ngo yandike amakuru yikora.
smsCaptureBenefit1: Ihita yandika amafaranga ya MTN na Airtel
smsCaptureBenefit3: Ibikorwa byose bya MoMo uzajya ubibona hamwe
allowNotificationsDescription: Twemerere tuguhe amakuru ku mafaranga yawe n'izindi nama.
openDeviceSettingsSubtitle: Jya muri Paramitere za telefone ufungure uburenganzira.
allSetDescription: Witeguye gutangira. Ushobora guhindura ibi igihe cyose muri Settings.
forgotPasswordTagline: MobiFlow ikoresha telefone. Kuko ntidusaba imeyili, guhindura ijambobanga bisaba ubufasha bwacu.
expenseLimitAlertsSubtitle: Menyeshwa igihe amakuru y'ukwezi arenga intego
goalRemindersSettingSubtitle: Wimenyekanishwe igihe ugejeje 80% ku intego yo kwizigamira
noRecentNotificationsSubtitle: Imenyekanisha ku mafaranga make, budget n'amakuru azerekana aha
howToUseIntro: Kurikira aya matambwe umenye uko ukoresha porogaramu neza.
tutorialStep1Body: Kanda 'Iyandikishe', wandike telefone n'ijambobanga. Ibi nibyo bizatuma amakuru yawe adatakara.
tutorialStep2Body: Ahabanza ubona amafaranga asigaye (Balance). Ushobora guhindura igihe ushaka kureba (Uyu munsi, Ukwezi...).
tutorialStep3Body: Kanda buto y'umuhondo (+) wandike amafaranga yinjiye cyangwa yasohotse. Hitamo icyo yakoreshejwe.
tutorialStep4Body: Jya muri 'Ibindi' → 'Igenamiterere' ufungure 'Auto-capture'. MobiFlow izahita yandika MoMo mu buryo bwikora.
tutorialStep5Body: Fungura 'Raporo' urebe aho amafaranga yagiye. Ushobora no kuyamanura muri telefone yawe (PDF).
tutorialStep6Body: Sura 'Ibindi' umenye niba witeguye kwaka inguzanyo n'uko warushaho kuzigama.
financialLiteracyIntro: Reba amashusho mu Kinyarwanda akwigisha gucunga imari y'ubucuruzi.
